faq.title: Help & Support
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions and learn how to get the most out of DineBuddies.

user_questions.a: The ultimate platform for food lovers! DineBuddies is an innovative social app blending fine dining discovery, meeting new people through curated food invitations, and building genuine tabletop communities.

user_questions.q: How do I create an invitation and split the bill?
user_questions.a: Tap the (+) button, select a restaurant, and set your date & time. In the settings, you can choose if the bill is 'On the Host', 'Split Equally', or 'Everyone pays for themselves'.

user_questions.q: What's the difference between Public, Private, and Private Invites?
user_questions.a:
• Public: Visible on the main map for anyone to request joining.
• Private: A hidden invitation sent exclusively via an elegant e-invite link to specific people.
• Dating: Specially curated romantic encounters requiring a Premium subscription, featuring advanced filters and trusted reviews.

user_questions.q: How do I accept join requests for my invitation?
user_questions.a: When someone requests to join, you receive an instant notification. Open the invitation details, review their profile, and tap 'Accept' or 'Decline'. Once accepted, a private group chat automatically unlocks.

Every restaurant on the app has its own 'Community'. By joining a restaurant's community, you enter a public chat room with the staff and other patrons to ask about dishes, share recommendations, and catch exclusive offers.

user_questions.q: How do I level up my account and earn Reputation Points?
user_questions.a: Reputation Points show your reliability! They increase when you attend events on time and receive 5-star ratings from hosts or guests. Points drop if you no-show or receive complaints.

user_questions.q: How do I upgrade to Premium (VIP)?
user_questions.a: Navigate to your Profile > Settings > Subscriptions. The VIP tier grants you exceptional search filters, full access to Private Invites, profile visitor insights, and unlimited private invites.

user_questions.q: How do I permanently delete my account?
user_questions.a: Go to Profile > Settings > Account > Delete Account. Please note that this action is permanent and data cannot be restored after 30 days.

user_questions.q: How do I filter restaurants and cafes?
user_questions.a: Use the search bar and filter toggles to sort by Restaurants, Cafes, currently Open venues, or rank them by Highest Rating and closest Distance.
Instead of waiting for app users, create a 'Private' invitation, copy its elegant electronic card link, and share it via WhatsApp! Anyone clicking the link is seamlessly guided to RSVP with you.

business_questions.q: What is the Business Pro Dashboard?
business_questions.a: A tailored, professional control center for DineBuddies restaurant partners. It gives you full control over your Menu, operating hours, direct chats, and broadcasting marketing posts across the platform.

business_questions.q: How do I publish a Featured promotional post?
business_questions.a: From the Pro Dashboard, navigate to 'Featured Posts', upload your promotional image, and write a caption. Your post will instantly appear to all users in the main app feed.

business_questions.q: How do I broadcast offers to my community?
business_questions.a: Every user who joins your 'Community' shows up in your Members tab. You can drop massive discounts directly into the 'Community Chat' to instantly drive traffic during off-peak hours.

business_questions.q: How do I manage my digital Menu?
business_questions.a: Under 'Menu & Services' in your dashboard, upload dishes with mouth-watering photos and pricing. The sleek digital menu updates instantly for all profile visitors.

business_questions.q: What is the difference between Professional and Elite Partner tiers?
business_questions.a: The 'Pro' tier sets up your storefront and directory listing. The 'Elite' tier is our powerhouse package, supercharging your algorithm ranking and granting unlimited, priority Featured Slides for maximum visibility.

business_questions.q: How do I handle Customer Reviews?
business_questions.a: The 'Reviews' tab provides deep analytical breakdowns of your ratings. You also have the power to officially reply to reviews under your restaurant’s verified name to build lasting customer loyalty.
